battle_flow.opening: Start with speed counters against normal speed attacks
battle_flow.mid_game: Watch for enrage triggers: Lasts 3-4 turns, calms when dealt 25% additional damage
battle_flow.late_game: In enraged state, focus on Use Technical attacks to counter Power charges. Speed for quick follow-ups
battle_flow.special_notes: No special states - focus on normal/enraged patterns

battle_flow.opening: Start with technical counters against normal technical attacks
battle_flow.mid_game: Watch for enrage triggers: Lasts 4-5 turns, extended by fire weakness exploitation
battle_flow.late_game: In enraged state, focus on Continue using Speed to counter Technical. Watch for Power counterattacks
battle_flow.special_notes: Monitor for special states: charged

battle_flow.mid_game: Watch for enrage triggers: Lasts 3-4 turns, calms when pack members are present

battle_flow.special_notes: No special states - focus on normal/enraged patterns
